story: As an Active Recorder, I want to quickly record an expense with a category, account, and custom date/time, so that my spending is tracked accurately even if logged later.
acceptance_criteria: User can open the expense entry UI in 1 tap from the dashboard
User must select at least a Category and Account before saving
Expense entry includes a date/time field, pre-filled with current system time
User can modify the date/time of the expense
Expense is persisted immediately and appears in the timeline at the selected date
